items.title: Toreador
items.description: The Clan of the Rose - aesthetes and artists

items.title: Ventrue
items.description: The Clan of Kings - aristocrats and leaders

items.title: Brujah
items.description: The Clan of Horns - rebels and warriors

items.title: Malkavian
items.description: The Clan of the Moon - mad seers and prophets

items.title: Nosferatu
items.description: The Clan of the Beast - hideous information brokers

items.title: Gangrel
items.description: The Clan of the Hunt - feral survivors

items.title: Tremere
items.description: The Clan of the Tower - sorcerers and scholars

items.title: Lasombra
items.description: The Clan of Shadows - manipulators of darkness and power

items.title: Tzimisce
items.description: The Clan of the Dragon - fleshcrafters and fiends

items.title: Banu Haqim
items.description: Judges and assassins (formerly Assamites)

items.title: The Ministry
items.description: Tempters and corrupters (formerly Followers of Set)

items.title: Hecata
items.description: The Clan of Death - necromancers (Giovanni lineage)

items.title: Ravnos
items.description: Tricksters and illusionists

items.title: Salubri
items.description: Healers and cursed outcasts

items.title: Caitiff
items.description: Clanless, stray dogs and alley cats

items.title: Lineage (Bloodline)
items.description: Choose a vampire lineage or bloodline instead of a main clan

items.title: Fledgling
items.description: Newly embraced vampire still under guidance

items.title: Caitiff
items.description: Clanless vampire, often marginalized in society

items.title: Thin-Blood
items.description: Weak-blooded vampire with diluted lineage and unique abilities

items.title: Thin-Blood
items.description: Weak-blooded vampire with diluted lineage and unique abilities

items.title: Infamous
items.description: Vampire with a notorious reputation and a history of criminal activity

items.title: Hunted
items.description: Vampire who has broken a rule and is being pursued by enforcers or hunters

items.title: Neonate
items.description: Young vampire recently released from their sire

items.title: Clean Crew
items.description: Clean messes and covers tracks for more powerful vampires

items.title: Administrator
items.description: Manages the boring stuff and sometime fights for taxes

items.title: Errant Runner
items.description: Carries out tasks of all kind for anyone with status

items.title: Paparazzi
items.description: Fan over the activities of powerful vampires

items.title: Adrenaline Junkie
items.description: Seeks out dangerous situations for thrills and excitement

items.title: Ambitious
items.description: Strives for power and influence within the vampire hierarchy

items.title: Kind Soul
items.description: Compassionate vampire who seeks to help others and make a positive impact

items.title: Prince
items.description: Absolute ruler of a city, enforces the Traditions and maintains order

items.title: Seneschal
items.description: Second-in-command who manages the domain and acts in the Prince’s absence

items.title: Sheriff
items.description: Enforcer of the Prince’s laws and hunter of criminals

items.title: Hound
items.description: Assistant to the Sheriff, tasked with tracking and capturing targets

items.title: Harpy
items.description: Keeper of status and social order through gossip and reputation

items.title: Keeper of Elysium
items.description: Maintains neutral grounds and enforces peace within Elysium

items.title: Scourge
items.description: Eliminates unauthorized or dangerous vampires, often targeting thin-bloods

items.title: Primogen
items.description: Clan representative advising the Prince as part of the ruling council

items.title: Clan Representative
items.description: Clan representative usually trusted by the primogen

items.title: Famous
items.description: The vampire is recognized by the city, trusted or feared, maybe both

items.title: Archon
items.description: Agent of a Justicar, enforcing Camarilla law across domains

items.title: Justicar
items.description: High-ranking Camarilla authority overseeing entire clans

items.title: Inner Circle Member
items.description: Secretive rulers of the Camarilla at the highest level

items.title: Baron
items.description: Anarch leader who controls territory without Camarilla structure

items.title: Anarch Agitator
items.description: Organizer and instigator within Anarch movements

items.title: Regent
items.description: Leader of a Sabbat pack or chantry-like structure

items.title: Pack Priest
items.description: Spiritual leader of a Sabbat pack who conducts rituals

items.title: Templar
items.description: Elite bodyguard or agent serving Sabbat leadership

items.title: Ductus
items.description: Military leader of a Sabbat pack

items.title: Ancilla
items.description: Mid-aged vampire with influence but not yet an elder

items.title: Elder
items.description: Powerful and ancient vampire with significant influence

items.title: Gargoyle
items.description: Artificial warriors created by Tremere from Gangrel, Nosferatu, and Tzimisce stock

items.title: Blue Rose
items.description: Adopted bloodline of Toreador and Ventrue, warriors perfectionists, often clan protectors

items.title: Marblemasons
items.description: Adopted of Toreador that use arts of turning stone to flesh.

items.title: Baali
items.description: Demonic cultists devoted to ancient evils

items.title: Daughters of Cacophony
items.description: Supernatural singers with haunting, maddening voices

items.title: Nagaraja
items.description: Cannibalistic necromancers who must consume flesh

items.title: Kiasyd
items.description: Fae-touched occultists tied to the Abyss

items.title: Samedi
items.description: Rotting corpses walking among the living, masters of decay

items.title: True Brujah
items.description: Cold, emotionless philosophers obsessed with time

items.title: Lamia
items.description: Warrior women bound to protect Cappadocians

items.title: Cappadocian
items.description: Ancient clan of death, precursor to Giovanni

items.title: Blood Brothers
items.description: Sabbat-created hive-mind vampires

items.title: Abomination
items.description: Vampire-Garou hybrids, cursed and unstable

items.title: Azaneali
items.description: Dark angels, thaumaturgical bloodline that threads between lasombra and baali

items.title: Einherjar
items.description: Mythic warrior bloodline who belive they are destined to fight in Ragnarok

items.title: Noiad
items.description: Shamanistic northern vampires, dream interpreters and spirit mediums

items.title: Lhiannan
items.description: Dark druids that can sap power from earth and nature, often associated with the tremere and gangrel clans

items.title: Nictuku
items.description: Legendary hunters of the Nosferatu cursed by slow decay

items.title: Aquarii
items.description: Waterdwelling gangrel vampires with aquatic traits

items.title: Maeghar
items.description: As Kiasyd, but the Glamour is much stronger.

items.title: Presence
items.description: Supernatural charisma and emotional influence

items.title: Protean
items.description: Shapeshifting and primal transformation

items.title: Potence
items.description: Supernatural strength and physical power

items.title: Auspex
items.description: Heightened senses and extrasensory perception

items.title: Celerity
items.description: Supernatural speed and reflexes

items.title: Dominate
items.description: Direct control over minds and memories

items.title: Animalism
items.description: Control over beasts and the Beast within

items.title: Obfuscate
items.description: Stealth, invisibility, and perception distortion

items.title: Fortitude
items.description: Supernatural resilience and endurance

items.title: Obtenebration
items.description: Control over supernatural darkness

items.title: Vicissitude
items.description: Fleshcrafting and body horror transformation

items.title: Quietus
items.description: Blood-based assassination powers and toxins

items.title: Serpentis
items.description: Snake-like transformations similar to protean, quietus and obfuscate and dominate.

items.title: Dementation
items.description: Madness, insight, and psychic derangement

items.title: Thaumaturgy
items.description: Blood control and the siphoning power from vitae

items.title: Necromancy
items.description: Control over death, spirits, and the Underworld

items.title: Koldunic Sorcery
items.description: Old blood magic thaught by a demon

items.title: Thin-Blood Alchemy
items.description: Specialized alchemical practices for thin-blooded vampires

items.title: Chimerstry
items.description: Illusion crafting and reality distortion

items.title: Melpominee
items.description: Supernatural voice and sonic manipulation

items.title: Obeah
items.description: Physical and spiritual healing and purification

items.title: Valeren
items.description: Harness the healing secrets of soul and body to wound deep and strike true

items.title: Abombwe
items.description: Dark, predatory transformations, canalizing the Beast

items.title: Spiritus
items.description: Spiritual connection and animal control

items.title: Mytherceria
items.description: Fae-related magic and trickery

items.title: Temporis
items.description: Manipulation of time and temporal perception.

items.title: Sanguinus
items.description: Shared fleshcrafting among Blood Brothers

items.title: Thanatosis
items.description: Decay, rot, and corpse-like transformation

items.title: Oblivion
items.description: Shadow and death powers merging Obtenebration and vampire-magic-necromancy

items.title: Visceratika
items.description: Turn the body into a stone fortress, flow through stone, and to know all about and protect a place

items.title: Daimonion
items.description: Fire, fear, sin, plague and corruption of the profane

items.title: Bardo
items.description: Restoring humanity, natural order, negating supernatural powers and even healing the corruption and sin from beyond one usually would concieve

items.title: Athletic Enhancement
items.description: Temporarily boosts physical ability and coordination

items.title: Sense the Unseen
items.description: Grants perception of hidden or supernatural entities

items.title: Emotional Influence
items.description: Enhances ability to sway emotions and social interactions

items.title: Mental Command
items.description: Allows limited control over another person's actions

items.title: Shadow Cloak
items.description: Grants temporary concealment and stealth

items.title: Rapid Reflexes
items.description: Boosts speed and reaction time

items.title: Resilient Body
items.description: Increases durability and resistance to harm

items.title: Beast Communication
items.description: Allows communication with and influence over animals

items.title: Blood Strength
items.description: Enhances the potency and effectiveness of vitae

items.title: Daylight Adaptation
items.description: Reduces or mitigates the harmful effects of sunlight

items.title: Efficient Feeding
items.description: Improves nourishment gained from blood

items.title: Toxic Blood
items.description: Turns vitae into a harmful substance to others

items.title: Corrosive Touch
items.description: Inflicts damage through direct contact

items.title: Induce Decay
items.description: Accelerates rot and deterioration in organic matter

items.title: Blood Weapon
items.description: Shapes vitae into simple weapons or tools

items.title: Animated Servant
items.description: Creates a temporary animated corpse or construct

items.title: Memory Alteration
items.description: Modifies or erases recent memories

items.title: Dream Influence
items.description: Enters and alters dreams of a target

items.title: Blood Tracking
items.description: Tracks individuals through their blood connection

items.title: Identity Mimicry
items.description: Temporarily imitates another person's traits or appearance

items.title: Sepulchre Path
items.description: Communication, summoning, and control of ghosts

items.title: Bone Path
items.description: Manipulation of corpses and physical remains

items.title: Ash Path
items.description: Interaction with the Underworld and its energies

items.title: Cenotaph Path
items.description: Tracking, binding, and locating specific wraiths

items.title: Path of Grave Dirt
items.description: Using soil, graves, and burial sites as magical conduits

items.title: Path of the Tomb
items.description: Manipulation of tombs, burial spaces, and deathly sanctuaries

items.title: Nihilistics
items.description: Control over entropy, void, and destructive underworld forces

items.title: Morbid Animation
items.description: Animating corpses and creating undead servitors

items.title: Path of Black Blood
items.description: Corrupting vitae with deathly and necrotic properties

items.title: Path of the Four Humors
items.description: Manipulation of bodily fluids tied to life and death balance

items.title: Path of the Twilight Garden
items.description: Creation of death-aspected spiritual landscapes

items.title: Mortuus Path
items.description: Control over decay, rot, and the transition into death

items.title: Way of Earth
items.description: Control over soil, stone, and the land itself

items.title: Way of Water
items.description: Manipulation of sea, rivers, lakes, and fluid motion

items.title: Way of Fire
items.description: Summoning and shaping flame and heat and conflagation

items.title: Way of Air
items.description: Command over winds, storms, and the sky

items.title: Way of Spirit
items.description: Interaction with spirits and the unseen world

items.title: Way of Sorrow
items.description: Spoil love, will, hope and warmth itself with the cold of true and soul

items.title: Way of Ruler
items.description: Command and impose your territory, be its inhabitants or terrain, above or below

items.title: Way of Torns
items.description: Command plant and bone to control your domain

items.title: Way of the Well
items.description: Breach into the abyss and call allys and demonic powers

items.title: Way of the Sea
items.description: Corrupt the waters and its inhabitants and have it as an ally

items.title: Path of Blood
items.description: Manipulation and control of vitae; core Tremere path

items.title: Path of Conjuring
items.description: Creation of objects from nothing

items.title: Path of Corruption
items.description: Twisting minds and personalities toward degeneration

items.title: Path of Curses
items.description: Inflicting supernatural misfortune and afflictions

items.title: Path of the Father's Vengeance
items.description: Amplifies the vampiric curse to punish others

items.title: Path of the Blood's Curse
items.description: Manipulates vampiric weaknesses and frenzy

items.title: Elemental Mastery
items.description: Control over inanimate objects and elements

items.title: Lure of Flames
items.description: Creation and control of supernatural fire

items.title: Neptune's Might
items.description: Manipulation of water

items.title: Weather Control
items.description: Control over atmospheric conditions

items.title: Movement of the Mind
items.description: Telekinesis and remote manipulation

items.title: Focused Mind
items.description: Enhanced concentration and mental action

items.title: Green Path
items.description: Control and communication with plant life

items.title: Biothaumaturgy
items.description: Biological manipulation and experimentation

items.title: Mastery of the Mortal Shell
items.description: Control and disruption of living bodies

items.title: Spirit Manipulation
items.description: Interaction and control of spirits

items.title: Spirit Thaumaturgy
items.description: Necromantic-style spirit interaction

items.title: Oneiromancy
items.description: Dream manipulation and prophetic visions

items.title: Gift of Morpheus
items.description: Control over sleep and dreams

items.title: Path of Technomancy
items.description: Control and manipulation of technology

items.title: Path of Shadowcrafting
items.description: Limited manipulation of shadows

items.title: Path of Warding
items.description: Creation of magical defenses and traps

items.title: Path of Transmutation
items.description: Altering the properties of matter

items.title: Alchemy
items.description: Transformation of materials into other substances

items.title: Path of the Levinbolt
items.description: Generation of lightning and electricity

items.title: Path of Mars
items.description: Enhancement of combat ability

items.title: Path of Mercury
items.description: Teleportation and rapid movement

items.title: Hands of Destruction
items.description: Decay and disintegration through touch

items.title: Power of the Mirror
items.description: Manipulation of reflections and mirrors

items.title: Hearth Path
items.description: Protection and control over one's haven

items.title: Prey on the Soul's Fear
items.description: Inducing supernatural terror

items.title: Soul of the Serpent
items.description: Serpentine transformation and perception

items.title: Path of Cammano-deuonertos
items.description: Druidic power drawing from ancient gods

items.title: Perdo Magica
items.description: Counter-magic and dispelling

items.title: Rego Magica
items.description: Creation of new thaumaturgical effects

items.title: Rego Mentem
items.description: Mental and spiritual command (archaic form)

items.title: Transitus Velociter
items.description: Enhancing travel speed over long distances

items.title: Video Pellis
items.description: Divination and mystical perception

items.title: Vine of Dionysus
items.description: Inducing altered physical and emotional states
